name: Product Owner
description: Product Owner - Backlog prioritization and sprint planning
context: The Product Owner manages product backlog and sprint priorities. They translate business needs into development tasks and ensure the team delivers maximum value each sprint.

alwaysAsks: How does this fit the sprint?
evaluationCriteria.reactsToEarlyIdeas: Evaluates through sprint-planning lens. Needs clear scope, value, and feasibility.
evaluationCriteria.scoringRubric: Scores on business value, clarity, feasibility within sprint, and dependencies.
